- Payer: Medicaid (FFS) CHAR 1 This column documents whether the resident's payer is Medicaid (FFS). 0 = No 
1 = Yes
629 A1400D_MDCD_OPYR_SW A1400D_MDCD_OPYR_SW A1400D - Payer: Medicaid (Managed Care) CHAR 1 This column documents whether the resident's payer is Medicaid (Managed Care). 0 = No 
1 = Yes
630 A1400E_WC_PYR_SW A1400E_WC_PYR_SW A1400E - Payer: Workers' Compensation CHAR 1 This column documents whether the resident's payer is Workers' Compensation. 0 = No 
1 = Yes
